No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Defendants AT&T Mobility Services, Llc and Ricardo Garcia's Notice Of Unopposed Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Records From Westside Community Mental Health Centers, Inc. as follows: The motion is unopposed and will be granted in its entirety.
